headline: Assessing Northern Trust (NTRS) Valuation After Mixed Return Data And An 8.7% Undervaluation Signal
summary: What Northern Trust’s Recent Performance Data Tells Investors Northern Trust (NTRS) has drawn investor attention after recent performance data showed mixed short term and longer term total returns, along with current revenue of US$8,093.9 million and net income of US$1,679.2 million. Over the past day and week, the stock shows total returns of 0.59% and 5.38%, while the past month reflects a 0.87% decline and the past 3 months show a 2.13% gain. Longer horizons highlight a 2.13% year to date...

headline: Northern Trust (NTRS) Is Up 5.4% After Earnings Beat And Profit Upgrades Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Northern Trust recently reported another quarter of earnings that came in ahead of analyst expectations, while upward revisions to full-year profit forecasts and a favorable Zacks Rank point to improving analyst sentiment toward the bank. At the same time, former Northern Trust executive Trey Hart’s Valhalla Group has partnered with Allocate to enhance private markets infrastructure, underscoring the growing importance of alternatives and technology-enabled solutions around the firm’s core...
